/usr/bin/c++ -g -rdynamic CMakeFiles/ROBOTEX.dir/robot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ROBOTEX.dir/subsystems/drivetrain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ROBOTEX.dir/subsystems/ESPRadio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ROBOTEX.dir/subsystems/relayBoard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ROBOTEX.dir/subsystems/customCANutil.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ROBOTEX.dir/subsystems/MPU6050util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ROBOTEX.dir/commands/DirDrive.cpp.o -o /home/jjh/Bot_Code/bin/ROBOTEX  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jjh/Bot_Code/lib/arm64 /home/jjh/Bot_Code/lib/arm64/libCTRE_Phoenix.so /home/jjh/Bot_Code/lib/arm64/libCTRE_PhoenixCCI.so /home/jjh/Bot_Code/lib/arm64/libCTRE_PhoenixTools.so -lwiringPi -li2c
